message:
feat(robot): expand command registry to ~80+ surfaces, normalize attention-loop flags, complete schema coverage

Expand the robot command registry with ~30 new command entries covering
previously unwired surfaces: errors, agent-health, health-oauth, logs,
monitor, smart-restart, bulk-assign, controller-spawn, context-inject,
agent-names, env, mail-check, support-bundle, quota-status, quota-check,
account-status, accounts-list, switch-account, xf-search, xf-status,
cass-insights, ensemble-suggest, ensemble-stop, schema, default-prompts,
profile-list, and profile-show. Each entry includes full parameter
definitions, defaults, and usage examples.

Normalize attention-loop flag names for consistency and to avoid
ambiguity with unrelated flags:
  - --since-cursor stays for --robot-events (raw replay)
  - --attention-cursor replaces --since-cursor for --robot-attention
  - --events-limit replaces --limit for --robot-events
  - --events-category/--events-session/--events-actionability for event filters
  - --attention-session/--attention-timeout/--attention-poll/--attention-condition
    for attention-specific parameters
  - --mail-project/--mail-status/--mail-until replace bare --project/--status/--until

Update all attention contract documentation, help text, inline examples,
and next-command builders to use the new flag names. Remove stale
--robot-snapshot --session= resync command variant.

Expand SchemaCommand from ~20 types to 80+ covering every robot response
type. Add surface metadata for all new commands in the registry. Update
help sections to list newly wired surfaces under their correct groups.

Add tests: AttentionCommandsUseLiveFlagNames verifies no stale flags
leak into examples, MatchesRootRobotCommandFlags cross-checks registry
against root.go flag declarations, NewlyWiredRobotTypes validates schema
generation for newly added types, and UsesCurrentAttentionLoopFlags
ensures help text matches current flag names.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -482,18 +574,22 @@ func buildCommandRegistry() []RobotCommandInfo {
 			Description: "Raw event replay from the attention feed. Returns events since the specified cursor with pagination support. Use this for full event history or debugging; prefer --robot-digest or --robot-attention for operator loops.",
 			Parameters: []RobotParameter{
 				{Name: "since-cursor", Flag: "--since-cursor", Type: "int", Required: false, Default: "0", Description: "Replay events after this cursor (0 = all)"},

 				{Name: "events-window-after", Flag: "--events-window-after", Type: "duration", Required: false, Default: "1m", Description: "Context after incident end for incident replay"},
+				{Name: "events-category", Flag: "--events-category", Type: "string", Required: false, Description: "Filter by event category"},

 			},
 		},

+  2. Attend:     ntm --robot-attention --attention-cursor=<cursor>

+  4. Loop:       Use cursor from step 2 response as --attention-cursor
